chameleon-admin.description: Central hub for Chameleon plugin updates and shared wp-admin tools for this site.

cron-monitor.description: Monitor cron health: scheduled events, wake log, disable visit cron, and run overdue jobs.

cc-url-redirects.description: Manage 301/302 redirects, regex rules, and import/export for WordPress URLs.

email-send-and-log.description: Send WordPress mail via Mandrill and log every send attempt with admin review tools.

erp-connector.description: Shared PostgreSQL ERP connector; other Chameleon plugins use this instead of their own DB layer.

erp-job-search.description: Search ERP jobs by NC, PO, registration, or VIN with attachments via ERP Connector.

hello-update-test.description: Minimal plugin to verify Chameleon Admin auto-updates from the central plugin repo.

kore-sim-manager.description: Manage SIM data for Woo subscriptions via Kore Wireless (extensible to other providers).

engineer-move-serials.description: Move engineer serial numbers to a target ERP location with preview, progress, and logging.

mask-login.description: Masked front-end login URL while keeping wp-admin available for administrators.

php-reports.description: Run scheduled SQL reports against ERP PostgreSQL and email Excel-openable results.

woo-mailer.description: Schedule Woo review-request and abandoned-basket emails from Chameleon admin.

woo-export-import-customer-order-details.displayName: Woo Export Import Customer Order Details
woo-export-import-customer-order-details.description: Export and import Woo customers, orders, and subscription data between sites.

woo-central-manager-hub.description: Hub site controller for multi-store Woo central management.

woo-central-manager-satellite.description: Satellite store connector for Woo Central Manager Hub.

woo-complete-and-dispatch.description: Attach ERP dispatch details to Woo orders and complete orders when fully shipped.

woo-erp-stock-sync.description: Sync ERP stock levels to Woo products by SKU on a schedule or on demand.

woo-product-gallery-images.description: Elementor product gallery with thumbnails, lightbox, zoom, and video support.

woo-region-stock-levels.description: Region-based Woo stock visibility and quantity limits per customer area.

woo-variation-manager.description: Variation swatches and per-variation gallery images with gallery sync on selection.

woo-product-badges.description: Rules-based product badge overlays on Woo catalog and product images.

knowles-booking.description: Online job booking for Knowles customers with ERP-aware scheduling and confirmations.

knowles-data-dashboard.description: Knowles customer data dashboard for visualization and operational management.

fleet-trak-dashboard.description: Fleet Trak customer data dashboard and reporting in wp-admin.

lightfoot-job-search.description: Lightfoot-branded ERP job search by NC, PO, registration, or VIN.

customer-reports.description: Scheduled customer report emails with ERP-backed data for Lightfoot sites.

lkq-reports.description: LKQ customer report emails and admin tools backed by ERP data.

simple-booking.description: Lightweight Chameleon booking shortcode for demo and simple appointment flows.

demo-gate.description: Password gate for Chameleon demo sites without affecting wp-admin access.

responsive-viewer.description: Preview pages at common breakpoints from a toolbar in the WordPress admin bar.

media-cleanup.description: Find media library entries with missing files; backup and clean up safely.

complete-address.description: UK address lookup and completion for Woo checkout and forms.

custom-online-diary.description: Online diary booking interface integrated with Chameleon scheduling workflows.

woo-product-search.description: Enhanced AJAX product search for Woo storefronts.
